title: Lenny Oakes
description: Tuesday lunch at Boatyard; Lenny forwards the reunion notices here for me to add to the calendar.

title: USS Truxtun Reunion 2026
description: Retired shipmates from Lenny's circle planning the fall reunion. Dates, hotel block, and roster shared here.

title: Ray Kowalski
description: Reunion committee. Sends the venue and hotel-block details for me to relay to Lenny.

title: Estelle Prather
description: Frank's widow and reunion volunteer; coordinates the memorial roll-call and the Saturday dinner count.

title: Annapolis Birders
description: Local birdwatching group sharing sightings along the Severn and Naval Academy seawall walks.

title: West Annapolis Neighbors
description: Munroe Court and nearby streets; trash pickup, road work, and the occasional lost-cat notice.

title: Carl Whitmore
description: Old shipmate driving down from Harrisburg; sorting out carpool timing for the reunion weekend.

title: Marge Callahan
description: Trades photos from the backyard feeder and the Quiet Waters heron rookery.
